languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

languages.text: "Госпожа Хейдари, вы изъявляли желание осмотреть мою коллекцию ксеносских артефактов. Нунциус, несмотря на присущий ему скепсис, все же согласился допустить вас к ней под его тщательным присмотром".
"Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."
languages.original_text: "Госпожа Хейдари, вы изъявляли желание осмотреть мою коллекцию ксеносских артефактов. Нунциус, несмотря на присущий ему скепсис, все же согласился допустить вас к ней под его тщательным присмотром".

traits.locale_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."
"Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."
"Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

languages.text: «Señora Heydari, expresó su deseo de inspeccionar mi colección de artefactos xenos. Nuncius, a pesar de su escepticismo natural, ha aceptado concederle acceso para bajo su estricta supervisión».
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

traits.locale_text: «Señora Heydari, expresó su deseo de inspeccionar mi colección de artefactos xenos. Nuncius, a pesar de su escepticismo natural, ha aceptado concederle acceso para bajo su estricta supervisión».

languages.text: 「ヘイダリ女史、あなたは私の異種族遺物のコレクションを検分したいとのご希望を口にされましたね。ヌンキウスは、生来の懐疑心にもかかわらず、自らの厳重な監督のもとであなたに閲覧を許可することに同意しました」
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

traits.locale_text: 「ヘイダリ女史、あなたは私の異種族遺物のコレクションを検分したいとのご希望を口にされましたね。ヌンキウスは、生来の懐疑心にもかかわらず、自らの厳重な監督のもとであなたに閲覧を許可することに同意しました」

languages.text: “海达利女士，你曾表示希望参观我的异形造物收藏。尽管努恩修斯天性多疑，但他已允许你在严格监督下进行访问。”
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

traits.locale_text: “海达利女士，你曾表示希望参观我的异形造物收藏。尽管努恩修斯天性多疑，但他已允许你在严格监督下进行访问。”

languages.text: "Meisterin Heydari, ihr habt Eurem Wunsch Ausdruck verliehen, meine Sammlung von Xenos-Artefakten zu inspizieren. Nuncius hat trotz seiner für ihn typischen Skepsis zugestimmt, Euch unter strenger Aufsicht Zugang zu gewähren."
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

traits.locale_text: "Meisterin Heydari, ihr habt Eurem Wunsch Ausdruck verliehen, meine Sammlung von Xenos-Artefakten zu inspizieren. Nuncius hat trotz seiner für ihn typischen Skepsis zugestimmt, Euch unter strenger Aufsicht Zugang zu gewähren."

languages.text: « Maîtresse Heydari, vous avez exprimé le désir d'examiner ma collection d'artefacts xénos. En dépit de son scepticisme initial, Nuncius a accepté de vous en donner l'accès, sous sa stricte supervision. »
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

traits.locale_text: « Maîtresse Heydari, vous avez exprimé le désir d'examiner ma collection d'artefacts xénos. En dépit de son scepticisme initial, Nuncius a accepté de vous en donner l'accès, sous sa stricte supervision. »

languages.text: "Üstat Heydari, zeno eseri koleksiyonumu inceleme arzunuzu dile getirmiştiniz. Nuncius, doğasındaki şüpheciliğe rağmen sıkı gözetimi altında size erişim izni vermeyi kabul etti."
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, you expressed the desire to inspect my collection of xenos artefacts. Nuncius, despite his inherent scepticism, has agreed to grant you access under his strict supervision."

traits.locale_text: "Üstat Heydari, zeno eseri koleksiyonumu inceleme arzunuzu dile getirmiştiniz. Nuncius, doğasındaki şüpheciliğe rağmen sıkı gözetimi altında size erişim izni vermeyi kabul etti."
